mainEntity.name: What are the top AEO strategies for lawyers in Los Angeles?
mainEntity.text: What are the top AEO strategies for lawyers in Los Angeles?

acceptedAnswer.text: Key AEO tactics for LA lawyers: 40-60 word answers to client questions, LegalService schema, voice-friendly phrasing, and LA-specific keywords like 'personal injury lawyer Los Angeles'.[4]

suggestedAnswer.text: LA firms should identify 10 niche questions (e.g., 'car accident claims LA'), format answers with H2 headings and schema, geo-target content, and monitor AI performance. This boosts featured snippets amid high competition; refresh for California legal changes to avoid outdated rankings.[1][4]
